hero.desc: In the texture, color, and scent of ingredients — I read the grain of being.

about.title2: I read the grain of being.
about.p1: I am someone who tries to understand the world through ingredients. Taste, scent, texture — when the senses open, existence becomes clearer.
about.p2: Cooking is my language. Not recipes, but a way of reading the time and place held within each ingredient, and the stories they carry.
about.p3: This space is a record of those sensations.
